subject: AirHub Insights March 2026
body:
Drones are saving lives, protecting infrastructure, and transforming industries. Here's what's happening now.
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ 
























AirHub - Logo [https://xr144.mjt.lu/img2/xr144/eb675c47-46b6-4b07-8926-097803321c96/content]

AirHub Update - March 2026 [https://xr144.mjt.lu/img2/xr144/f233a8ec-aa39-4bcb-87f4-aaa94c972de7/content]https://www.airhub.app/

















AirHub - Insights March 2026






Welcome to this month’s AirHub newsletter.



The professional drone industry continues to evolve rapidly. Across public safety, security, and critical infrastructure, drone operations are becoming embedded in daily workflows and decision-making.



At the same time, sectors such as construction, mining, and utilities are scaling their programs with increasing structure and accountability.



In this edition, we share relevant insights, operational lessons, and key regulatory and technology developments shaping professional drone and robotics operations. We hope you find it valuable.



Stephan van Vuren

CEO & Co-Founder AirHub

























Situational Awareness with drones [https://xr144.mjt.lu/img2/xr144/9a01e25f-dba1-44ba-9b43-dfb2a4fe7465/content]https://www.airhub.app/resources/news/real-time-situational-awareness?utm_medium=organic&utm_source=linkedin&utm_campaign=en_blog_march-edition

















Beyond the camera: why situational awareness is the next frontier







For years, drones have been valued as standalone tools. Fast, flexible, and capable of putting eyes somewhere quickly. But that phase is behind us.



The organizations leading the way today are not just flying drones. They are building a connected, real-time operational picture. One that fuses drone telemetry, live video, airspace data, and sensor feeds into a single view. Not separate dashboards, but one coherent layer that reflects what is actually happening, on the ground and in the air.



For public safety, security, and critical infrastructure teams, this shift changes how decisions are made. When your team has access to fused, real-time information, response times improve, coordination becomes sharper, and confidence in the field increases.



Our recent piece explores what this evolution looks like in practice and what it means for organizations scaling their drone programs.

Read more→ [https://www.airhub.app/resources/news/real-time-situational-awareness?utm_medium=organic&utm_source=linkedin&utm_campaign=en_blog_march-edition]































Industry insights














EU Drone Security Strategy [https://xr144.mjt.lu/img2/xr144/114ff383-d0a8-48a2-a5bc-17308af5e574/content]https://digital-strategy.ec.europa.eu/en/policies/drone-security










EU Drone Security Strategy






The European Commission has outlined a dedicated policy framework to address drone security and the potential risks posed by malicious or unauthorized drone activity. This strategy focuses on building a resilient European ecosystem by enhancing coordination between member states and industry partners. It provides a roadmap for securing critical infrastructure and ensuring that drone technology remains a safe and trusted tool for professional use.
Read more → [https://digital-strategy.ec.europa.eu/en/policies/drone-security]



















Drone used by Police [https://xr144.mjt.lu/img2/xr144/aa423b24-b2c5-4d8a-b25b-67b089275676/content]https://www.westmidlands.police.uk/news/west-midlands/news/news/2026/january/remote-controlled-police-drones-keeping-coventry-safe/









Operational excellence: Remote policing in Coventry






West Midlands Police are demonstrating the practical benefits of Drones as First Responders (DFR) to enhance public safety in Coventry (UK). These remote-controlled drones provide rapid visual intelligence, allowing officers to assess incidents and coordinate responses more effectively. This operational model serves as a benchmark for how law enforcement agencies can integrate drone technology to improve community security and resource allocation.
Read more → [https://www.westmidlands.police.uk/news/west-midlands/news/news/2026/january/remote-controlled-police-drones-keeping-coventry-safe/]




































Ecosystem expansion: Vortex & GUST









The drone market is maturing fast. General drone services are making way for highly specialized operations, and companies in critical infrastructure, oil & gas, and industrial inspection are no longer looking for a standard solution. They need answers to complex challenges, such as inspections in confined and hazardous spaces.


That is why AirHub is announcing a collaboration with Vortex and GUST, bringing together three complementary areas of expertise:

















Vortex [https://xr144.mjt.lu/img2/xr144/d5bfc714-7176-4c9a-b8d8-c408962b12fd/content]









Vortex






Provides the specialised hardware, including Flyability systems, required for complex and hard-to-reach industrial inspection environments.
URL INVULLEN



















Gust B.V. [https://xr144.mjt.lu/img2/xr144/5dcc4b29-3b2d-416f-bfb6-7e38cb6b4ba4/content]









GUST






Delivers expert on-site training and operational guidance to ensure teams are fully prepared and mission-ready from day one.

URL INVULLEN






















AirHub - Drone Operations Platform [https://xr144.mjt.lu/img2/xr144/1161de0e-994b-45d9-bb73-9845ce9ef8f9/content]









AirHub






Provides the software platform and compliance framework to ensure full control over fleet management, data sovereignty, and security.


https://www.airhub.app/nl/all-features/drone-operation-center





































Portugal’s Bombeiros [https://xr144.mjt.lu/img2/xr144/0303c627-12ca-4f5c-bbf8-f44a962dbd6e/content]https://www.airhub.app/resources/how-portuguese-firefighters-use-airhub-to-manage-700-drone-pilots?utm_medium=email&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=en_case-study_february-edition

















How Portugal scaled one of Europe’s largest drone programs







The Portuguese Firefighters (Bombeiros) have successfully integrated AirHub to coordinate an extensive network of 700 drone pilots across the country. This large-scale deployment demonstrates how centralized fleet management is vital for maintaining oversight, compliance, and real-time situational awareness during emergency operations. By streamlining pilot certification and flight logging, the organization has created a standardized framework for rapid, data-driven response.



Read the full case study to see how they manage one of the largest professional drone networks in Europe.

Read more → [https://www.airhub.app/resources/how-portuguese-firefighters-use-airhub-to-manage-700-drone-pilots?utm_medium=email&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=en_case-study_february-edition]




























Emergency Robotics Summit 2026 [https://xr144.mjt.lu/img2/xr144/7f587101-95c7-464f-b956-26b44e60e05f/content]https://www.ukerro.org/index.php

















Meet us at the Emergency Robotics Summit 2026







AirHub is proud to be a bronze sponsor of UKERRO 2026, the UK's leading event dedicated to emergency robotics and drone response.



The summit brings together professionals from fire and rescue, law enforcement, search and rescue, and critical infrastructure on 29 and 30 April in Bury, Greater Manchester.



It is a hands-on event with live demonstrations, workshops, and expert presentations focused on real-world applications of robotics and drone technology in public safety operations.



We will be there and would love to connect. Reach out if you would like to meet during the event.

Read more→ [https://www.ukerro.org/index.php]


































We hope you enjoy your flight with us







Thank you for being a part of the AirHub community. We hope these Q1 updates are helping you operate more safely and efficiently.










Stephan van Vuren - CEO & Co-Founder AirHub [https://xr144.mjt.lu/img2/xr144/08f89f94-5228-4a57-bb4a-1ba455f69c0f/content]





Stephan van Vuren
CEO & Co-Founder AirHub
